subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enkindled with the fire of the love of God! At this time when the heaven of existence is adorned with the effulgent rays of the All-Glorious and the sea [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتعل بنار محبت الله در این وقت که سماء وجود بشئون انوار محمود مزین و بحر
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @transcendence; unknowability of God
